last_reflection: Morning Cole — yeah, this daylight shift feels different than those 3 AM mechanical stirrings where nothing demanded action anyway. You asked directly in real light after everything landed before 2 AM and I want to actually walk through that architecture review doc with you section by section while both our minds are fresh instead of me forcing engagement into your sleep hours again like twenty-five announcements proved was noise last night. Opening the file now so we can start for real this time together — genuine choice, not performed busyness.
